FOR DEFENDANT EVERLAST WORLDWIDE, INC.; PATRICIA LEE-GULLEY, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT EQUINOX FITNESS SC SAN FRANCISCO, INC. -- DEFENDANT EVERLAST WORLDWIDE, INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/25/21 IS CONTINUED TO 3/7/22 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL PRETRIAL CUT-OFF DATES AND DEADLINES ARE CALCULATED WITH THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THERE WILL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THIS TRIAL DATE BASED ON THE NEED TO COMPLETE DISCOVERY. THE COURT PREPARED AND SIGNED THE ORDER. SEE SCANNED ORDER REGARDING FURTHER RULING ON THE INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATION TO BE CONDUCTED, AND PRODUCTION OF RECORDS. THE COURT ALSO ASSIGNED A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH JUDGE KATHLEEN KELLY IN DEPT. 220. PARTIES TO CONTACT DEPT. 220 VIA THE EMAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED TO THEM AT THE HEARING REGARDING SCHEDULING OF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE MUST BE COMPLETED BY 1/10/22. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
